title: Gesamtstrecke 24h - Practice

body:
Gesamtstrecke 24h - Practice
Mercedes-AMG GT3 2020 | medium confidence

Duration: 34.0m captured, 1 completed valid laps, 3.1 valid distance laps.
Fuel model: 14.39 L/lap average, 106.0 L tank, about 7.4 laps/tank.
Stints: 2 recorded, avg 1.1 laps / 9.0m.
Pit service: 3 service stops, 5 pit-road entries, avg lane 44s, service 37s.
Observed fill rate: 1.44 L/s.

Strategy note:
8-lap stints are plausible only with fuel saving versus the average; compare against a conservative 7-lap rhythm before the next race.

Quality: medium; no quality warnings.
